message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "User" as User
rectangle "Frontend" as Frontend
interface "API Gateway" as APIGateway
rectangle "Matching Service" as MatchingService
  rectangle "Controller" as Controller
  rectangle "Service" as Service
rectangle "Matching Database" as MatchingDatabase
  rectangle "Questions" as Questions
  rectangle "MatchRequests" as MatchRequests

User --> Frontend : PUT /api/find/match\npayload: {requestId}
Frontend --> APIGateway : PUT /api/find/match\npayload: {requestId}
APIGateway --> Controller : PUT /api/find/match\npayload: {requestId}
Controller --> Service : checkForMatch(requestId)
Service --> Questions : find user's MatchRequest with requestId
Questions --> Service : user's MatchRequest
Service --> MatchRequests : find another MatchRequest
MatchRequests --> Service : another MatchRequest
Service --> Questions : get a random question
Questions --> Service : Question
Service --> Service : create sessionInfo and attach to each MatchRequest
Service --> MatchRequests : update the 2 MatchRequests
MatchRequests --> Service : user's MatchRequest
Service --> Controller : user's MatchRequest
Controller --> APIGateway : 200 OK\npayload: {user's MatchRequest}
APIGateway --> Frontend : 200 OK\npayload: {user's MatchRequest}
Frontend --> Frontend : switch to session page

@enduml
